title: Split cleanup_protect_request into common_wipe and nvm_error paths
description: Refactor the single cleanup_protect_request label (oscore.c:1524) into distinct paths: one for standard errors that just wipe sensitive data, and a specific path for OSCORE_ERR_NVM_FAILED that also manages SSN state (rollback or safe advance under mutex). This distinguishes NVM persistence errors per security requirements. Reference recent hardening in oscore_protect_request.
